name.ja: <ruby>三<rt>さん</rt></ruby><ruby>幻<rt>げん</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby>の<ruby>殉<rt>じゅん</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt>きょう</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt>しゃ</rt></ruby>

text.en: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can place 1 "Sacred Beast" Field Spell or "Sacred Beast" Continuous Spell/Trap from your Deck face-up on your field. If you control another "Sacred Beast" monster: You can Special Summon 2 "Martyr of the Sacred Beasts" from your hand, Deck, and/or GY. During your opponent's End Phase, if this card and a Level 10 "Sacred Beast" monster are in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Martyr of the Sacred Beasts" once per turn.
